key_evidence: Riot police stormed CHP (main opposition) HQ with tear gas and rubber bullets May 24 after a 3-day standoff (WaPo, PBS, Euronews)
Appeals court nullified CHP leader Ozgur Ozel's election and suspended the executive board, ordering replacement by predecessor Kilicdaroglu (Turkish Minute, May 24)
Multi-city protests in Ankara and Izmir met with tear gas and water cannon (Courthouse News)
Borsa Istanbul fell 6% on the May 21 ruling; Time (May 25) frames a 'deepening democratic crisis'
